theme.en: AI Demand Meets Physical and Political Limits
theme.zh: AI需求撞上物理与政策边界

dek.en: AI demand is still pulling foundry, memory, photonics, and accelerator capacity forward, but infrastructure approvals and technology controls are becoming harder constraints. Suppliers are expanding around those limits while buyers look for lower-cost, more available compute.
dek.zh: AI需求仍在推动晶圆代工、存储、光子技术和加速器产能扩张，但基础设施审批与技术管制正成为更强的约束。供应商围绕这些边界扩产，买方则转向成本更低、供货更充足的算力方案。

title.en: AI & Accelerators
title.zh: AI与加速器

title.en: AMD Pitches a $3,999 Ryzen AI Halo System Against DGX Spark
title.zh: AMD以$3,999 Ryzen AI Halo系统对标DGX Spark

summary.en: AMD is positioning a $3,999 Ryzen AI Max+ 395 developer system with 128GB of unified memory against Nvidia's DGX Spark, now priced at $4,699. The $700 gap and Windows 11 support give developers another local-inference option when discrete accelerator memory and system pricing remain tight.
summary.zh: AMD推出售价$3,999、搭载Ryzen AI Max+ 395和128GB统一内存的开发系统，对标现价$4,699的Nvidia DGX Spark。$700的价差与Windows 11支持，为开发者提供了另一种本地推理选择，尤其适合独立加速卡显存和整机价格仍偏紧的市场环境。

title.en: AMD Extends Advanced Shader Delivery Across RDNA GPUs
title.zh: AMD将Advanced Shader Delivery扩展至全系RDNA GPU

summary.en: AMD is extending Microsoft's Advanced Shader Delivery across RDNA 1 through RDNA 4 GPUs, with the report citing game-load reductions of as much as 95%. Moving shader preparation out of the critical launch path can improve the installed base without new silicon, although gains will depend on title and distribution support.
summary.zh: AMD正把Microsoft Advanced Shader Delivery扩展到RDNA 1至RDNA 4 GPU，报道所引数据称游戏加载时间最高可缩短95%。将着色器准备移出启动关键路径，可在不更换硅片的情况下改善存量GPU体验，但实际收益仍取决于游戏和分发平台的支持。

title.en: Foundry & Manufacturing
title.zh: 晶圆代工与制造

title.en: Tower Semiconductor Secures $1.3 Billion in Silicon-Photonics Deals
title.zh: Tower Semiconductor拿下$13亿硅光子订单

summary.en: Tower Semiconductor shares rose 11.7% after reports that the specialty foundry secured silicon-photonics agreements worth $1.3 billion. The deal value signals that optical connectivity is moving from a supporting component into a meaningful foundry demand driver as AI clusters scale.
summary.zh: Tower Semiconductor据报获得总值$13亿的硅光子协议后，股价上涨11.7%。这一订单规模表明，随着AI集群扩张，光互连正从配套器件转变为具有实质规模的晶圆代工需求来源。

title.en: TSMC's May Revenue Rises 30% on AI Demand
title.zh: AI需求推动台积电5月营收增长30%

summary.en: TSMC reported a 30% year-over-year increase in May revenue as AI-related demand continued to support advanced-node production. The growth keeps utilization and capacity allocation in focus, particularly for customers competing for leading-edge wafers and advanced packaging.
summary.zh: 在AI相关需求持续支撑先进制程生产的背景下，台积电5月营收同比增长30%。这一增速使产能利用率和分配继续成为焦点，尤其影响争夺先进制程晶圆与先进封装产能的客户。

title.en: Memory
title.zh: 存储

title.en: China's Two Largest Memory Makers Prepare for IPOs
title.zh: 中国两大存储厂商筹备IPO

summary.en: China's two leading memory manufacturers are reportedly preparing public listings, creating a new route to finance capacity and technology development. Large IPOs could strengthen domestic DRAM and NAND investment while forcing Korean suppliers and investors to reassess the competitive landscape.
summary.zh: 中国两家主要存储制造商据报正筹备上市，为产能与技术开发开辟新的融资渠道。大型IPO可能增强本土DRAM和NAND投资能力，也会促使韩国供应商与投资者重新评估竞争格局。

title.en: SK Hynix Maps Four New Fabs and 375-Layer NAND
title.zh: SK hynix规划四座新厂与375层NAND

summary.en: SK Hynix outlined a roadmap spanning four new fabs and 375-layer NAND as it expands around AI-led memory demand. The plan points to simultaneous investment in HBM capacity and conventional storage density, but execution will depend on equipment availability, ramp timing, and memory pricing.
summary.zh: SK hynix公布涵盖四座新晶圆厂和375层NAND的路线图，以扩大对AI驱动存储需求的承接能力。该计划显示公司将同时投资HBM产能和传统存储密度，但执行仍取决于设备供应、爬坡节奏与存储价格。

title.en: Equipment & Materials
title.zh: 设备与材料

title.en: Nvidia's CPO Expansion Lifts Korean Tool and Materials Orders
title.zh: Nvidia扩大CPO布局，带动韩国设备与材料订单

summary.en: Nvidia-led expansion in co-packaged optics is reportedly driving an order rush for Korean materials and equipment suppliers. The spending indicates that scaling AI interconnect bandwidth is creating demand beyond GPUs and switches, extending into optical packaging processes and their specialized inputs.
summary.zh: 据报道，由Nvidia带动的共封装光学（CPO）扩张正在推动韩国材料与设备供应商订单上升。这表明AI互连带宽扩展带来的需求已超出GPU和交换机本身，延伸到光学封装工艺及其专用材料。

title.en: Policy & Geopolitics
title.zh: 政策与地缘政治

title.en: Opposition Blocks More Than 75 U.S. Data-Center Projects
title.zh: 美国逾75个数据中心项目因反对而受阻

summary.en: More than 75 U.S. data-center projects worth $130 billion were blocked in the first quarter of 2026, matching the number stopped during all of 2025. Bipartisan concern over electricity and water use is turning local permitting into a material constraint on AI infrastructure and, indirectly, accelerator demand.
summary.zh: 2026年第一季度，美国已有逾75个、总值$1,300亿的数据中心项目受阻，数量与2025年全年相当。围绕电力与用水的跨党派担忧，正使地方审批成为AI基础设施的实质约束，并间接影响加速器需求兑现。

title.en: Nvidia Hires Bruce Andrews to Lead Government Affairs
title.zh: Nvidia任命Bruce Andrews主管政府事务

summary.en: Nvidia hired former Intel executive Bruce Andrews to lead government affairs as policy becomes more central to AI-chip sales and deployment. The appointment adds experienced representation in Washington at a time when export controls, infrastructure rules, and sovereign-compute negotiations can reshape addressable markets.
summary.zh: Nvidia任命前Intel高管Bruce Andrews负责政府事务，反映政策因素对AI芯片销售与部署的重要性持续上升。在出口管制、基础设施规则和主权算力谈判都可能重塑可服务市场之际，这项任命加强了公司在华盛顿的政策沟通能力。

title.en: U.S. Order Forces Anthropic to Restrict Its Newest Models
title.zh: 美国命令迫使Anthropic限制其最新模型

summary.en: Anthropic disabled access to its newest Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models after a U.S. security directive reportedly barred use by foreign nationals worldwide. Although this is a model-access action rather than a chip rule, it shows export-control logic extending up the AI stack and raises compliance risk for multinational development teams.
summary.zh: 在美国安全指令据报禁止全球外国公民使用后，Anthropic关闭了其最新Claude Fable 5和Mythos 5模型的访问权限。虽然这属于模型访问限制而非芯片规则，但它显示出口管制逻辑正向AI技术栈上层延伸，并提高跨国研发团队的合规风险。

theme.en: Efficiency Moves Up the Systems Stack
theme.zh: 效率优化上移至系统栈

dek.en: This week's strongest results reduce wasted work through memory reuse, sparse model selection, adaptive retrieval, resource-aware orchestration, and speculative execution. Device and circuit papers remain thinner, but the systems work points directly at lower inference and infrastructure cost.
dek.zh: 本周较强的成果通过内存复用、稀疏模型选择、自适应检索、资源感知编排和推测执行减少无效计算。器件与电路论文相对偏少，但系统层工作直接指向更低的推理与基础设施成本。

title.en: Devices & Process
title.zh: 器件与工艺

title.en: Memristor-CMOS Artificial Synapse for Associative Learning
title.zh: 用于联想学习的忆阻器-CMOS人工突触

papers.authors: P. Dong, L. Wang, D. Zhang, et al.

summary.en: The paper integrates a memristor-based artificial-synapse element with CMOS circuitry to implement Pavlov-style associative-memory learning. It is relevant to compact neuromorphic learning because state storage and synaptic weighting can be colocated. The candidate record provides no array size, process details, energy data, or measured-silicon results, so scalability and hardware efficiency cannot be judged from the available metadata.
summary.zh: 该论文将忆阻器人工突触单元与CMOS电路结合，实现巴甫洛夫式联想记忆学习。其意义在于状态存储与突触权重可在紧凑的神经形态硬件中共址。候选记录未提供阵列规模、制程、能耗或实测硅片结果，因此目前无法判断其可扩展性与硬件效率。

title.en: Circuits & Architecture
title.zh: 电路与架构

title.en: Safe Memory Reuse for Task-and-Future Runtimes
title.zh: 面向任务与Future运行时的安全内存复用

summary.en: The work adds an await_delete construct to future-based runtimes so storage can be safely reused after all consumers finish, addressing a practical limitation of immutable future values. A block-wise symmetric-matrix inversion implementation in an extended Taskflow runtime approaches linear scaling on large matrices. Futures still impose substantial overhead on smaller problems, so the benefit depends on crossing an amortization threshold.
summary.zh: 该工作为基于Future的运行时加入await_delete机制，使所有消费者完成后可安全复用存储，解决Future值不可变带来的实际限制。作者在扩展版Taskflow中实现分块对称矩阵求逆，大矩阵上接近线性扩展。小规模问题仍承受明显的Future开销，因此收益取决于能否跨过开销摊销阈值。

title.en: Affine Models Compensate SAR-ADC Non-Idealities in Massive MIMO
title.zh: 仿射模型补偿大规模MIMO中的SAR-ADC非理想效应

summary.en: The paper develops two affine models for low-resolution SAR-ADC behavior in massive MU-MIMO, one based on Bussgang decomposition and one optimized for signal-to-distortion ratio. The models explicitly include converter non-idealities that ideal quantization analyses usually omit, then support low-complexity digital mitigation. The available abstract does not report measured converter silicon or system-level power savings, so the result remains a modeling and algorithm contribution.
summary.zh: 该论文为大规模MU-MIMO中的低分辨率SAR-ADC建立两种仿射模型，一种基于Bussgang分解，另一种针对信号失真比优化。模型显式纳入理想量化分析常忽略的转换器非理想效应，并据此设计低复杂度数字补偿。现有摘要未报告ADC实测硅片或系统级功耗节省，因此主要贡献仍是建模与算法。

title.en: AI Research for Hardware
title.zh: 面向硬件的AI研究

title.en: Recursive Agent Harnesses Scale Long-Context Work
title.zh: 递归Agent Harness扩展长上下文任务

papers.authors: E. Lumer, S. Sen, K. Paul, et al.

summary.en: Recursive Agent Harnesses let a parent agent generate executable workflows that spawn tool-using subagents in parallel rather than recursively calling a bare model. With GPT-5 held constant, the approach improves the Codex baseline from 71.75% to 81.36% on 199 Oolong-Synthetic tasks spanning contexts up to 4 million tokens. The gain shifts scaling pressure toward orchestration, parallel inference, and structured communication, but evidence is currently limited to a controlled long-context benchmark.
summary.zh: Recursive Agent Harness让父agent生成可执行工作流，并行启动具备工具能力的子agent，而不是递归调用裸模型。在固定使用GPT-5时，该方法在199个Oolong-Synthetic任务上把Codex基线从71.75%提升至81.36%，上下文长度最高达400万token。它把扩展压力转向编排、并行推理与结构化通信，但当前证据仍局限于受控长上下文基准。

title.en: Sparse Bagging Compresses Ensembles by Up to 96%
title.zh: 稀疏Bagging将集成模型最高压缩96%

summary.en: Simplex-Constrained Sparse Bagging jointly prunes and calibrates ensemble models using out-of-bag loss plus a concave quadratic sparsity penalty. The method reports up to 96% ensemble compression with linear inference speedups while preserving or improving accuracy and calibration. Results cover bagged model families rather than modern transformer workloads, so transfer to accelerator-heavy inference still needs demonstration.
summary.zh: Simplex-Constrained Sparse Bagging使用袋外损失与凹二次稀疏惩罚，联合完成集成模型剪枝和概率校准。该方法报告最高96%的集成压缩，并获得线性推理加速，同时保持或改善准确率与校准表现。实验面向Bagging模型族而非现代Transformer负载，因此能否迁移到加速器密集型推理仍需验证。

title.en: Uncertainty-Aware Retrieval Chooses RAG Chunk Granularity Per Query
title.zh: 不确定性感知检索按查询选择RAG分块粒度

summary.en: UMG-RAG treats retrieval granularity as a query-specific reliability problem, combining dense and sparse retrievers across multiple chunk sizes using entropy-derived confidence. A parent-promotion variant retrieves with fine chunks but returns broader, non-redundant context to the generator. The design is training-free and could reduce wasted context processing, although the candidate abstract does not expose latency, token, or energy savings.
summary.zh: UMG-RAG把检索粒度视为按查询变化的可靠性问题，利用熵生成的置信度融合多种分块尺度上的稠密与稀疏检索器。其parent-promotion变体用细粒度分块定位证据，再向生成器返回更宽且不重复的上下文。该设计无需训练，可能减少无效上下文计算，但候选摘要未给出延迟、token或能耗节省数据。

title.en: CloudCons Tests Forecasting Models on Real Consolidation Decisions
title.zh: CloudCons以真实资源整合决策评测预测模型

papers.authors: X. Zhang, L. Shen, M. Chen, et al.

summary.en: CloudCons evaluates forecasting models by their downstream value in cloud resource consolidation rather than prediction error alone. Its datasets span Huawei Cloud, Microsoft Azure, and Google Borg workloads with periodic, bursty, and noisy demand patterns. This is useful for infrastructure efficiency because a statistically better forecast may not produce a better placement decision; the available abstract, however, truncates before reporting the full comparative results.
summary.zh: CloudCons不只比较预测误差，而是按模型在云资源整合决策中的下游价值进行评测。数据集覆盖Huawei Cloud、Microsoft Azure和Google Borg负载，包含周期型、突发型与高频噪声需求。该基准有助于基础设施效率研究，因为统计上更准的预测未必带来更好的放置决策；但现有候选摘要在完整对比结果前被截断。

title.en: Block Verification Speeds Speculative Diffusion Sampling
title.zh: 块验证加速推测式扩散采样

papers.authors: A. Soen, H. Husain, V. De Bortoli, et al.

summary.en: The paper adapts block verification from speculative LLM decoding to continuous diffusion sampling while preserving the target distribution through acceptance and rejection. Its training-free Free Drafter reports up to a 6.3% speedup over existing speculative methods with negligible additional overhead. The gain is modest, but the method matters because it avoids training a separate draft model and attacks repeated diffusion steps directly.
summary.zh: 该论文把推测式LLM解码中的块验证移植到连续扩散采样，并通过接受-拒绝机制保持目标分布。无需训练的Free Drafter相对现有推测方法最高加速6.3%，额外开销可忽略。增益幅度不大，但其价值在于无需训练独立草稿模型，并直接减少重复扩散步骤。

title.en: Quantum Computing
title.zh: 量子计算

title.en: Two-Copy Readout Targets Practical Quantum Advantage for Chaotic Systems
title.zh: 双副本读出瞄准混沌系统的实用量子优势

papers.authors: M. Wang, X. Xue, M. Chung, et al.

summary.en: The work encodes higher-order statistical priors for chaotic dynamical systems in entangled quantum states and uses joint Bell measurements on two copies for readout. It proves a copy-complexity separation: the proposed readout is independent of qubit count for selected Pauli functionals, while adaptive single-copy full-Pauli readout requires exponentially many copies. The authors demonstrate the readout in simulation and on IQM superconducting processors, but the broader end-to-end advantage remains tied to the stated data-access and measurement assumptions.
summary.zh: 该工作把混沌动力系统的高阶统计先验编码进纠缠量子态，并通过两个副本上的联合Bell测量完成读出。论文证明了副本复杂度分离：对特定Pauli泛函，所提读出与量子比特数无关，而自适应单副本全Pauli读出需要指数级副本。作者在仿真和IQM超导处理器上实现了读出，但端到端优势仍依赖论文设定的数据访问与测量假设。
